list.title: My wheels
list.noTeams: You don't belong to any team.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this wheel?
confirmDelete.message: "{{name}}" and all its entries will be permanently deleted.

errors.INVALID_NAME: The name must be between 1 and 100 characters.
errors.DUPLICATE_ENTRY: This entry is already in the wheel.
errors.INVALID_ENTRY_TEAM_MEMBER: This member does not belong to this team.

form.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most 100 characters.
form.teamIdHint: Team picker coming soon (depends on @pivot/ui-core) — enter the team's numeric identifier for now.
form.teamIdPositive: Team ID must be a positive integer.
form.sprintRefMaxLength: Sprint reference must be at most 100 characters.
form.timerPositive: The timer must be a strictly positive whole number of seconds.
form.voteCountPositive: The vote count must be a strictly positive whole number.

error.INVALID_TITLE: Title is invalid (required, at most 100 characters).
error.INVALID_TIMER: One of the timers must be a strictly positive whole number of seconds.
error.INVALID_VOTE_COUNT: The votes-per-participant count must be a strictly positive whole number.
error.teamAccessDenied: You are not a member of this team.
error.unauthorized: Authentication required — this feature is not available until the authentication module (@pivot/ui-core) is wired in.
error.generic: Something went wrong while creating the session. Please try again.
error.CUSTOM_FORMAT_ID_REQUIRED: A custom format must be selected or created.
error.CUSTOM_FORMAT_NOT_FOUND: The selected custom format could not be found.
error.CUSTOM_FORMAT_ID_NOT_ALLOWED: The custom format id must only be sent for the "Custom" format.
error.INVALID_FORMAT_LABEL: The custom format name is invalid.
error.CUSTOM_FORMAT_INVALID_COLUMN_COUNT: The custom format must have between 2 and 8 columns.
error.INVALID_COLUMN_LABEL: One of the column labels is invalid.

customFormat.cardHint: Create a custom format (2 to 8 columns)
customFormat.labelRequired: The custom format name is required.
customFormat.labelMaxLength: The custom format name must be at most 60 characters.
customFormat.columnsHint: Between 2 and 8 columns, each with a label.
customFormat.columnMaxLength: The column label must be at most 40 characters.

error.actionFailed: The action failed. Please try again.
